settings.hero_text: For over 170 years, Marvin has put finely tuned mechanics at the heart of every watch. From early hand-wound calibers to integrated automatic systems, our legacy breathes life into modern horology.
settings.timeline_intro: Trace how Marvin evolved from foundational pocket-watch engineering to refined mechanical calibers designed for the modern collector.
settings.archive_intro: Reference the calibers, bridges, plates, and finishing details that define Marvin's mechanical language across decades.
settings.influence_intro: See how Marvin's engineering approach intersects with Swiss suppliers, finishing standards, and contemporary mechanical expectations.
settings.chart_caption: Illustrative split of Marvin movement influence across heritage, finishing, architecture, and modern usability.
settings.brand_text: More than a visual cue, the Marvin caliber mark reflects our dedication to disciplined engineering, Swiss mechanical integrity, and distinctive finishing. It appears on movements that carry our standards forward.
settings.cta_text: Explore Marvin's modern watches powered by enduring mechanical philosophy and Swiss craft.

settings.title: Foundation calibers
settings.text: Entry hand-wound movement platforms establish Marvin's functional architecture.

settings.text: Slimmer proportions and improved finishing support elegant daily-wear designs.

settings.title: Automatic evolution
settings.text: Rotor-driven systems and improved shock protection modernize performance.

settings.text: Modern Marvin designs reconnect archival engineering cues with today's enthusiasts.
